channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download Cloudflare WARP 2026.3.846.0
item.description: Cloudflare WARP is a free application developed by Cloudflare that provides a secure and private connection to the internet. The app acts as a Virtual Private Network (VPN) service, encrypting users' internet traffic and routing it through Flare's global network. Cloudflare Zero Trust replaces legacy security perimeters with Cloudflare's global network, making the Internet faster and more secure for teams around the world. Consult our reference architecture to learn how to evolve your...

item.title: Download Prey Basic 1.13.29
item.description: Prey is free software that allows you to track and find your laptop, phone and tablet whenever stolen or missing - easily and all in one place. It's open source, lightweight, offering you full remote control, 24/7. You can quickly find out what the thief looks, what he is doing on your device and where he is actually hiding using GPS or WiFi geolocation. It's payback time. Basically, you install a small agent in your PC or phone that will silently wait for the remote signal to wake up and...

item.title: Download lessmsi 2.12.9
item.description: Lessmsi (Less MSIerables) is a free and portable application that allows users to view and extract the contents of MSI files. How does it work? Files with the .msi extension are not as widely used as their .exe cousins, but both contain programs for Windows. The main difference between them is that the latter does not always come with an installer, while it comes standard with the former. However, there will be cases where you just need to view or want to extract specific content from...

item.title: Download RealCADD 5.80
item.description: RealCADD is a vector-based 2D computer-aided drawing (CAD) program used for drawing technical drawings, plans, and diagrams on desktop operating systems. The software is positioned as a lighter and more intuitive alternative to large CAD suites like AutoCAD, for users who primarily need 2D drawing. Features of RealCADD Supports precise 2D drawing with straight lines, arcs, splines, dimensions, crosshatching, and text, suitable for architectural, mechanical, and general engineering...
